insight: Committed direction (owner-decided 2026-07-13): shared-world ladder to the global show (Stage 0 server-authoritative command-stream sim -> Stage 1 slice+co-op -> Stage 2 async global show service -> Stage 3 shared space). 2.5D tactical; 3D only Stage 3. Literal-MMO pivot and single-player-only both explicitly rejected. Source of truth: docs/DIRECTION.md

Simulation contract: state must be a pure function of (seed, ordered command log); sim never self-advances on wall time — pluggable clock drivers (paused solo / timed declare-window co-op fields / wall-clock broadcast). apply_command(cmd)->[events]. This is what keeps co-op, spectate, replay, Stage-2 broadcasts reachable. Details: docs/DIRECTION.md technical contract deltas

Full project review (TTRPG defects catalog, conversion analysis, repo assessment, market verdict) lives in docs/review/review-0..4. review-1 findings A1-F10 are the rules-defect catalog the digital rules addendum must answer; fix-first five listed at end of review-1

The TTRPG book has no advancement rules, no universal condition-advancement rule, ambiguous core damage ('usually 1' vs weapons dealing 2-4), uncostable RPM, and unlimited 0-cost actions. These are deliberate digital-addendum decisions, NOT things to infer silently from the book. Canonical digital rulings: docs/rules-addendum.md (drafted overnight 2026-07-13)

Three vocabularies exist and disagree: rulebook docx (Bleed/Crush/Burn/Chill/Poison/Infection + Human/Animal/Robot), char-sheet app constants.js (DMG_TYPES Crush/Bleed/Burn/Shock/Toxic/Psy; RACES Cyborg/Android/...), game repo seed data (matches rulebook). CANONICAL for the game: rulebook conditions + this repo's seed enums. Do not import char-sheet vocab

The live TTRPG campaign's MongoDB export is the canonical content source: 44 skill templates, 28 items, 100 tags, 27 affixes, 3 enemies incl 6-phase tutorial boss Incinedile (Network 50HP surface-immunity design). Char-sheet repo (Galactic-Prime-Time) is the running campaign tool - do not break it; its data seeds this game's SQLite content

wf start adoption is PARTIAL by decision: memory/learn/context/validation/traces + activation block + boot.json receipt YES; 'wf install --packs core,gds' NO (skills already reachable via Workflow repo in session scope; avoids adapter drift). Revisit only if sessions run without the Workflow repo. wf trace/learn need explicit --dir/--file pointing into THIS repo (tools default to the Workflow checkout root)

Session work happens on branch claude/galactic-prime-time-review-kxlelf (push with -u). Descriptive commit messages, no signatures. Owner sleeps overnight sessions: proceed autonomously, queue questions for morning, mark taste-call rulings PROVISIONAL

wf start adoption is PARTIAL by decision: memory/learn/context/validation/traces + activation block + boot.json receipt YES; 'wf install --packs core,gds' NO (skills reachable via Workflow repo in session scope; avoids adapter drift). Revisit only if sessions run without the Workflow repo. CRITICAL: wf tools resolve RELATIVE paths against the Workflow checkout, not cwd — always pass ABSOLUTE --dir/--file/--config into THIS repo (memory check --dir, learn --file, trace --dir, context check --config)

Remote session containers cannot obtain a Godot 4 binary (agent proxy 403s GitHub release downloads and godotengine download hosts; apt ships only godot3, wrong GDScript syntax). Honest validation ladder: gdparse (pip gdtoolkit) for syntax in-container; scripts/run_sim_tests.sh exits 3=SKIP without a binary; real test runs happen on the owner machine or CI with Godot 4.5. Never report GDScript tests as passing from a container without a binary

docs/GPT_Master_Compendium.md is the consolidated design record through ~May 5 (system v0.91, GDD v0.1, boss/modifier/story design, party data). Precedence: DIRECTION.md > rules-addendum.md > compendium > PDFs > rulebook docx. Conflicts with newer live data are catalogued as NQ1-NQ7 in docs/review/review-5-compendium-delta.md + questionnaire section L (biggest: cooldowns 'removed entirely' vs July skill text still using them)

Creation math confirmed: 7 points across Body traits + 7 across Core (party creation stats sum exactly 7+7); psychic resistance threshold verified /15 in app code 2026-07-14 (compendium's 'app uses /10' note is stale). Modifier economy canon (addendum R12): weapon tier gives slots (Crude 0/0..Exceptional 2/2 prefix/suffix) AND gates modifier-tier access; extraction friction scales by tier

Noise/absorption mechanic (compendium GDD v0.1) adopted into DIRECTION: noisy combat pulls nearby encounters into the fight at Clock-reset beats; audience clock and absorption clock can be one system. Anti-grind pillar; KAN-5 implements

Owner rulings: NO cooldowns - skills gate on PRIMING (prep conditions: channels/stacks/stances; high-tier items may skip primes; addendum R3, criterion 9 superseded, engine cooldown code deprecated-dormant until the priming pass). NO party cap - recruitment economy (strong=hard to get, weak=short-lived; arena deployment+exhaustion bound per-fight numbers). Incinedile: 6 phases canon, breach B = 7+ dmg single HIT. Social director north star recorded in DIRECTION: mother-brain LLM emits schema-bound commands, never freewrites state; per-NPC models rejected

Brand paradox RULED intentional: mercy earns the Dissolution songs. Brand = contract; immunity works by EQ LOSS (pragmatic perception, dulled emotions - branded characters should literally read drier game text; presentation-layer dual-prose is the flagship implementation). IP split: party characters are the players' - game inclusion UNDECIDED, don't build premades on them; Nikita+Sasha story is KEEPER content (rebrandable surface, protected story shape). Canon accumulates in docs/story-canon.md
